item.title: Trim groom presentation functions to bare essentials
item.intent: Groom summary and diff output is concise status lines, not rich formatted sections. print_groom_summary and print_groom_diff together shrink from 95 to ~25 lines.
item.description: print_groom_summary (58 lines) renders a multi-section status with priority breakdowns, highlight lists, and conditional messaging. print_groom_diff (37 lines) shows before/after with multiple computed deltas. Replace both with terse one-liner status output: counts before, counts after, delta.
steps: Replace print_groom_summary with 2-3 log_info lines showing item counts and ready counts
Replace print_groom_diff with a single line showing ready before/after and items added/skipped
Remove the has_highlights loop and must_should_total computation from summary
Verify: groom command still shows meaningful before/after context
acceptanceCriteria: Groom command output includes item counts and ready counts before and after
